issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating double tasks across the post-referral, pre-referral, and sale pending workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks on the affected deal records.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that previously fell out of and back into Offer Accepted stage
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to an earlier stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second transition. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were cycled back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks continuing to trigger after deal marked as Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly suppressing enrollment for these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was applied to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral tasks that were incorrectly generated for Closed Lost or Transferred deals during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing incorrect loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to the agent still referenced the previous LO rather than the updated one. The correct LO was visible in Dash but not reflected in the workflow-generated emails. The issue was resolved by Luis on the product side.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually send a corrected email to the agent with the updated loan officer information.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks after referral accepted on March 18th
issues.desc: A referral accepted on March 18th did not trigger any post-referral workflow tasks for the HA. The root cause was identified as an error in how data was being pulled, which prevented the workflow from filtering correctly. The issue was escalated to product for resolution.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any referrals accepted around March 18th into the post-referral workflow and complete any outstanding tasks manually.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent in Offer Accepted stage without credit amount populated
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was triggering in the Offer Accepted stage before closing information had been submitted, resulting in a message with no dollar amount. The SMS should only send during the Sale Pending stage when the credit amount is available. It was confirmed to be a Dash-triggered communication and was escalated to product.
issues.workaround: For any buyers who received the incomplete credit SMS during the Offer Accepted stage, manually send a follow-up communication with the correct buyer credit amount once closing information is submitted.
